summary: Comprehensive testing of Incoming & Dispatch Management Module. All backend APIs working correctly (13/14 tests passed, 1 skipped). Frontend UI fully functional with dashboard, PO shipments, live tracking, and document management features.
seed_data_creation: Using existing test data - PO ID: 61bc85e4-8d3c-4d1f-a533-b7c5cfda5bee with 2 invoices, 2 dispatches, 2 destinations (Mumbai Warehouse, Delhi Distribution Center)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Incoming & Dispatch Management Module fully functional. All features tested and working.

dashboard_overview.notes: Returns total_invoices (2), in_transit (0), delivered (2), pending (0), delayed (0), active_alerts (0), quantity metrics

pos_with_shipments.notes: Returns POs with enriched shipment data including color_indicator

po_summary.notes: Returns complete PO summary with invoices and dispatches

delivery_performance.notes: Returns 100% on-time rate, 0h avg delay, 22.4h avg transit

simulate_tracking.notes: GPS tracking simulation working (MOCKED - uses Haversine formula)

dispatches.notes: Returns dispatch list with tracking history

summary_cards.notes: 6 cards visible - Total Invoices (2), In Transit (0), Delivered (2), Pending (0), Delayed (0), Active Alerts (0)

quantity_metrics.notes: 3 metrics visible - Quantity Dispatched (800), Quantity Received (800), Pending Quantity (0)

delivery_performance_chart.notes: Pie chart showing 100% On-Time Rate with legend (Critical Delay, On Time, Slight Delay)

distance_vs_delivery_chart.notes: Bar chart showing data for 0-100km and 1000km+ ranges

supplier_logistics_table.notes: Table showing supplier with 2 dispatches, 2 on-time, 0 delayed, 100% efficiency, 22.4h avg transit

po_shipments_tab.notes: Shows PO-20260302-28A295 with 2 Invoices, 800 Dispatched, 800 Received, 0 Pending, 2 Delivered badge, color indicator

po_incoming_detail_page.notes: Loads with data-testid='po-incoming-detail', shows PO number, On Time badge, supplier name

po_detail_summary_cards.notes: 6 cards - Invoices (2), Ordered (500), Dispatched (800), Received (800), In Transit (0), Delayed (0)

invoices_tab.notes: Shows 2 invoice cards with status badges, destination, date, shipped/received/distance metrics

invoice_expansion.notes: Expandable cards show dispatches with DSP number, status, vehicle, driver, location, qty, Track button

live_tracking_tab.notes: Shows 'All shipments delivered' message when no active shipments, Active Shipments section

tabs_navigation.notes: All tabs (Overview, PO Shipments, Analytics, Alerts) working on dashboard; (Invoices, Live Tracking, Documents) working on detail page

mocked_apis.gps_tracking: GPS tracking uses simulated coordinates via /api/incoming/dispatches/{id}/simulate-tracking. Uses Haversine formula for distance calculation. No external logistics API integration.
